concept_name: Lorentz Force on a Moving Charged Particle (F = q v × B)
source_book: DC Pandey Vol 2 Ch.26 §26.2 (force on a moving charge in a magnetic field) — table-of-contents reference only; teaching authored from first principles. Diamond #2 of the magnetism chapter (M1, archetype B — force-in-field). The atomic concept being taught is *direction* (F is perpendicular to BOTH v and B via the right-hand palm rule, F reverses for negative charge) and *magnitude* (F = |q|vB sin θ, max at θ = 90°, zero when v ∥ B). The deepest insight is that F ⊥ v ALWAYS, so the magnetic force does no work, so |v| is conserved, so a charged particle in a uniform B describes a closed circle (or helix). The four most common student errors targeted here: F is along v, F is along B, F does work on the particle, and using the left hand for the cross-product. Diamond #2 establishes the renderer primitives for archetype B (ambient uniform field grid, moving particle, per-frame F = q v × B vector, palm-rule HTML overlay) so the rest of Ch.26 can be authored against them via the M3 patterns library. Pedagogy ordered per reviewer Asmi Singh (2026-06-16): 0° → 90° → 45° → 10° so the pure circle establishes 'why circular' before the helix is introduced.

real_world_anchor.primary: Picture an old CRT television your grandparents kept in the corner of the living room — the kind with a deep glass back. Inside, an electron beam shoots from the back of the tube toward the front screen. Magnetic deflection coils around the neck of the tube create a B-field that steers the beam — line by line, top to bottom — across the phosphor screen so you see a picture. Without F = qv × B, the beam would land on one fixed spot and the screen would show only a dot.
real_world_anchor.secondary: Picture the night sky over the Arctic during a geomagnetic storm — green and purple curtains of aurora light. Those colours come from solar-wind protons that smashed into Earth's magnetic field. The Lorentz force curved each proton along the field lines, funneling them down toward the poles. ISRO's satellites in low Earth orbit measure these particle streams continuously; the curving path is F = qv × B in real time.
real_world_anchor.tertiary: Picture BARC's variable-energy cyclotron in Kolkata. Inside the vacuum chamber, a strong vertical B-field bends accelerated protons into a spiral path. Each lap, an alternating voltage gives them a kick of energy; the radius widens, the period stays the same, the proton spirals outward until it hits the target. The whole spiral is just the Lorentz force on a moving charge — the same physics as the CRT, just at MeV energies.

q_sign.name: Sign of the charge (positive or negative)

B.name: Magnitude of the uniform magnetic field

formulas.lorentz_force_vector: F = q (v × B) — F is perpendicular to both v and B; the cross product gives the direction (right-hand rule), q gives the sign.
formulas.lorentz_force_magnitude: F = |q| v B sin θ — maximum when v ⊥ B (θ = 90°), zero when v ∥ B (θ = 0° or 180°).
formulas.no_work_done: F · v = q (v × B) · v = 0 for every v. Magnetic force never changes kinetic energy; |v| is constant.
formulas.cyclotron_radius: r = m v_perp / (|q| B), where v_perp = v sin θ. The particle's circular component of motion has this radius.
formulas.cyclotron_period: T = 2π m / (|q| B). Independent of v — every charge of the same q/m takes the same time per loop.

constraints: B must be uniform — non-uniform fields produce more complex motion (e.g., magnetic mirrors).
Particle must be non-relativistic — at v close to c, the mass increases and r grows accordingly.
When v ∥ B (θ = 0), the cross product is zero — particle moves in a straight line, no force.
Cyclotron period T = 2π m / (|q| B) depends only on charge-to-mass ratio and B, not on v or r.
Magnetic force ALWAYS does zero work — speed |v| is conserved exactly, only direction changes.

aha_moment.statement: F is perpendicular to BOTH v and B. Cross product, never along either.
aha_moment.visual_confirmation: At θ = 90° F is largest and always points to the centre of the circle. Tilt θ back toward 0 (STATE_5 → STATE_7) and the circle opens into a helix — but F stays at 90° to v the whole time.

scene_composition.text: θ = 0° — v is parallel to B

Uniform field B (blue arrows).
Electric field E = 0.
Orange arrow = v.

Lorentz force:
F = qE + q v×B
E = 0 → F = q v×B

θ = 0 → sin 0° = 0 → F = 0.
The proton drifts straight — no bending.

tts_sentences.text_en: Setup. The blue arrows are a uniform magnetic field B. There is no electric field here — E is zero.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Setup देखते हैं। ये blue arrows एक uniform magnetic field B दिखाते हैं। यहाँ कोई electric field नहीं है — E zero है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Setup చూద్దాం. ఈ blue arrows ఒక uniform magnetic field B చూపిస్తున్నాయి. ఇక్కడ electric field లేదు — E zero.

tts_sentences.text_en: The orange arrow is the proton's velocity v. Right now v points along B, so the angle theta is zero.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Orange arrow proton की velocity v है। अभी v, B के साथ point कर रहा है, इसलिए angle theta zero है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Orange arrow proton యొక్క velocity v. ఇప్పుడు v, B వెంట point చేస్తోంది, కాబట్టి angle theta zero.

tts_sentences.text_en: The full Lorentz force is q E plus q v cross B. With E zero, only the magnetic part is left.
tts_sentences.text_hi: पूरी Lorentz force है q E plus q v cross B। E zero होने पर, सिर्फ magnetic part बचता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: పూర్తి Lorentz force అంటే q E plus q v cross B. E zero అయినప్పుడు, magnetic part మాత్రమే మిగులుతుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Its size is q v B sine theta. With theta zero, sine zero is zero, so F is zero.
tts_sentences.text_hi: इसकी size है q v B sine theta। Theta zero होने पर, sine zero zero होता है, तो F zero है।
tts_sentences.text_te: దీని size అంటే q v B sine theta. Theta zero అయినప్పుడు, sine zero zero, కాబట్టి F zero.

tts_sentences.text_en: So the proton just drifts in a straight line — no bending.
tts_sentences.text_hi: तो proton बस एक straight line में drift करता है — कोई bending नहीं।
tts_sentences.text_te: కాబట్టి proton straight line లో drift చేస్తుంది — bending లేదు.

scene_composition.text: θ = 90° — pure perpendicular, F at max

F = qvB · sin 90° = qvB
Full circle, no drift along B

Radius r = mv / (qB)
Period  T = 2π m / (qB)
Note: T does NOT depend on v
F ⊥ v at every instant → F·v = 0 → no work → |v| is constant. Trail dots are equally spaced — proof of constant speed.

tts_sentences.text_en: Now theta equals ninety. v is perpendicular to B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अब theta ninety है। v, B के perpendicular है।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇప్పుడు theta ninety. v, B కు perpendicular.

tts_sentences.text_en: Sine ninety equals one, so F reaches its maximum.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Sine ninety equals one, इसलिए F अपने maximum तक पहुँचता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Sine ninety equals one, కాబట్టి F తన maximum చేరుకుంటుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: There is no drift along B now. The path is a perfect circle.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अब B के साथ कोई drift नहीं है। Path एक perfect circle है।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇప్పుడు B వెంట drift లేదు. Path ఒక perfect circle.

tts_sentences.text_en: F always points to the centre — it is the centripetal force.
tts_sentences.text_hi: F हमेशा centre की तरफ point करता है — यही centripetal force है।
tts_sentences.text_te: F ఎల్లప్పుడూ centre వైపు point చేస్తుంది — ఇది centripetal force.

tts_sentences.text_en: On the right, the 3D right-hand shows the rule. Fingers first, thumb last.
tts_sentences.text_hi: दाईं तरफ, 3D right-hand rule दिखाता है। पहले fingers, अंत में thumb।
tts_sentences.text_te: కుడి వైపు, 3D right-hand rule చూపిస్తోంది. ముందు fingers, చివర thumb.

tts_sentences.text_en: Point your fingers along v.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अपनी fingers को v की दिशा में point करो।
tts_sentences.text_te: మీ fingers ని v వెంట point చేయండి.

tts_sentences.text_en: Curl them toward B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: उन्हें B की तरफ curl करो।
tts_sentences.text_te: వాటిని B వైపు curl చేయండి.

tts_sentences.text_en: Your thumb now gives F — pointing to the circle's centre.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अब तुम्हारा thumb F देता है — circle के centre की तरफ।
tts_sentences.text_te: మీ thumb ఇప్పుడు F ని ఇస్తుంది — circle యొక్క centre వైపు.

tts_sentences.text_en: Newton's second law for circular motion. The magnetic force is the centripetal force.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Circular motion के लिए Newton's second law। Magnetic force ही centripetal force है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Circular motion కోసం Newton's second law. Magnetic force అనేది centripetal force.

tts_sentences.text_en: Solve for the radius.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Radius के लिए solve करते हैं।
tts_sentences.text_te: Radius కోసం solve చేద్దాం.

tts_sentences.text_en: And the period equals circumference divided by speed. The v cancels — T depends only on m, q, and B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: और period equals circumference divided by speed। v cancel हो जाता है — T सिर्फ m, q, और B पर निर्भर करता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Period equals circumference divided by speed. v cancel అవుతుంది — T కేవలం m, q, మరియు B పై ఆధారపడుతుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Notice the trail dots are equally spaced — equal arc per unit time.
tts_sentences.text_hi: देखो trail dots बराबर दूरी पर हैं — equal arc per unit time।
tts_sentences.text_te: Trail dots సమానంగా spaced గా ఉన్నాయి గమనించండి — equal arc per unit time.

tts_sentences.text_en: F is always perpendicular to v, so F dot v is zero.
tts_sentences.text_hi: F हमेशा v के perpendicular है, इसलिए F dot v zero है।
tts_sentences.text_te: F ఎల్లప్పుడూ v కు perpendicular, కాబట్టి F dot v zero.

tts_sentences.text_en: So the kinetic energy never changes. Magnetic forces do no work.
tts_sentences.text_hi: तो kinetic energy कभी नहीं बदलती। Magnetic forces कोई work नहीं करतीं।
tts_sentences.text_te: కాబట్టి kinetic energy ఎప్పుడూ మారదు. Magnetic forces work చేయవు.

misconception_watch.belief: A magnetic field can speed up a charged particle.
misconception_watch.one_line_fix: Never. F · v = 0 by construction. Only electric fields can change |v|.

scene_composition.text: Direction keeps changing — does the SPEED change too?

Speed |v| stays put — it NEVER changes.
Watch the trail: the dots are
equally spaced (equal distance, equal time).

The orange v-arrow swings to a
new direction every instant —
but its LENGTH stays the same.
F is always ⊥ v → F·v = 0 → work = 0 → kinetic energy can't change → speed is locked. A magnet can STEER a charge, never SPEED it up.

tts_sentences.text_en: The proton is going in a circle, so its direction is always changing.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Proton circle में जा रहा है, इसलिए इसकी direction हमेशा बदल रही है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Proton circle లో వెళ్తోంది, కాబట్టి దీని direction ఎల్లప్పుడూ మారుతోంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Predict first. As it goes round and round, does its speed change?
tts_sentences.text_hi: पहले predict करो। जैसे-जैसे यह चक्कर लगाता है, क्या इसकी speed बदलती है?
tts_sentences.text_te: ముందు predict చేయండి. ఇది తిరుగుతూ తిరుగుతూ వెళ్తున్నప్పుడు, దీని speed మారుతుందా?

tts_sentences.text_en: Watch the trail. The dots are equally spaced — equal distance covered in equal time.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Trail देखो। Dots बराबर दूरी पर हैं — equal time में equal distance।
tts_sentences.text_te: Trail చూడండి. Dots సమానంగా spaced — equal time లో equal distance.

tts_sentences.text_en: That means the speed is exactly constant. Only the direction turns.
tts_sentences.text_hi: इसका मतलब speed बिल्कुल constant है। सिर्फ direction बदलती है।
tts_sentences.text_te: అంటే speed సరిగ్గా constant. Direction మాత్రమే మారుతుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Why? The force is always perpendicular to the velocity.
tts_sentences.text_hi: क्यों? Force हमेशा velocity के perpendicular होता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఎందుకు? Force ఎల్లప్పుడూ velocity కు perpendicular గా ఉంటుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: So the work done by the force is F dot v, and that is zero.
tts_sentences.text_hi: तो force द्वारा किया गया work है F dot v, और वह zero है।
tts_sentences.text_te: కాబట్టి force చేసే work అంటే F dot v, అది zero.

tts_sentences.text_en: No work means the kinetic energy cannot change. So the speed is locked.
tts_sentences.text_hi: No work का मतलब है kinetic energy बदल नहीं सकती। तो speed locked है।
tts_sentences.text_te: No work అంటే kinetic energy మారదు. కాబట్టి speed locked అయింది.

tts_sentences.text_en: This is the big idea. A magnetic force only steers a charge — it can never speed it up or slow it down.
tts_sentences.text_hi: यही सबसे बड़ी बात है। Magnetic force सिर्फ एक charge को steer करती है — यह उसे कभी speed up या slow down नहीं कर सकती।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇదే అసలు విషయం. Magnetic force ఒక charge ని steer చేయగలదు మాత్రమే — దానిని ఎప్పటికీ speed up లేదా slow down చేయలేదు.

misconception_watch.belief: The magnetic force speeds the charge up — a stronger field makes it go faster.
misconception_watch.one_line_fix: Never. F is ⊥ v, so F·v = 0 and the work is zero. A bigger B makes a TIGHTER circle, not a faster particle. Only an electric field can change |v|.

scene_composition.text: Fleming's left-hand rule — Class-10 reconciliation

Left hand:
ForeFinger = B (index)
seCond = v (middle)
thuMb = F

+q only.
For −q, reverse F.
For any θ ≠ 90°,
use right-hand rule.
Same physics as F = q v × B — three orthogonal fingers instead of a cross-product curl. Pick whichever hand you remember from Class 10.

tts_sentences.text_en: Quick bridge for Class-10 students. Some of you remember this as Fleming's left-hand rule from the motor effect chapter.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Class-10 के students के लिए एक quick bridge। कुछ लोगों को यह motor effect chapter से Fleming's left-hand rule के रूप में याद है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Class-10 students కోసం ఒక quick bridge. మీలో కొందరికి ఇది motor effect chapter నుండి Fleming's left-hand rule గా గుర్తుంటుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Index finger along B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Index finger, B की दिशा में।
tts_sentences.text_te: Index finger, B వెంట.

tts_sentences.text_en: Middle finger along v.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Middle finger, v की दिशा में।
tts_sentences.text_te: Middle finger, v వెంట.

tts_sentences.text_en: Thumb along F.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Thumb, F की दिशा में।
tts_sentences.text_te: Thumb, F వెంట.

tts_sentences.text_en: For a positive charge, this gives the exact same force direction as the right-hand cross product.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Positive charge के लिए, यह right-hand cross product के बिल्कुल same force direction देता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Positive charge కోసం, ఇది right-hand cross product తో సరిగ్గా same force direction ఇస్తుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: We still prefer the right-hand rule because it works for any angle theta, and it handles negative charges without reversing.
tts_sentences.text_hi: हम right-hand rule को prefer करते हैं क्योंकि यह किसी भी angle theta के लिए काम करता है, और यह negative charges को reverse किए बिना handle करता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: మనం right-hand rule ను prefer చేస్తాం ఎందుకంటే ఇది ఏ angle theta కైనా పనిచేస్తుంది, మరియు negative charges ని reverse చేయకుండా handle చేస్తుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Same physics — pick whichever hand you remember.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Same physics है — जो hand याद हो वही pick करो।
tts_sentences.text_te: Same physics — మీకు గుర్తున్న hand ని pick చేయండి.

scene_composition.text: θ = 45° — tilt back from the circle

F = qvB · sin 45° ≈ 0.71 × max
(less than the full circle)

The closed circle OPENS into a helix —
part of v now drifts along B
F scales as sin θ. Coming down from 90°, the circle opens into a helix because part of v points along B. WHY sin θ? — next.

tts_sentences.text_en: We just saw the perfect circle at ninety degrees. Now tilt v back to forty-five degrees.
tts_sentences.text_hi: हमने अभी ninety degrees पर perfect circle देखा। अब v को forty-five degrees पर tilt करते हैं।
tts_sentences.text_te: మనం ఇప్పుడే ninety degrees లో perfect circle చూశాం. ఇప్పుడు v ను forty-five degrees కు tilt చేద్దాం.

tts_sentences.text_en: The Lorentz force is still here, but the path is no longer a closed circle — it opens into a helix.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Lorentz force अभी भी यहाँ है, लेकिन path अब closed circle नहीं है — यह एक helix में खुल जाती है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Lorentz force ఇంకా ఇక్కడ ఉంది, కానీ path ఇప్పుడు closed circle కాదు — ఇది helix గా తెరుచుకుంటుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: F has dropped to seventy-one percent of its maximum. Sine forty-five is about zero point seven one.
tts_sentences.text_hi: F, अपने maximum का seventy-one percent रह गया है। Sine forty-five करीब zero point seven one है।
tts_sentences.text_te: F, దీని maximum లో seventy-one percent కు తగ్గింది. Sine forty-five దాదాపు zero point seven one.

tts_sentences.text_en: Why a helix now? Because part of v points along B and drifts forward, while the rest circles around B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अब helix क्यों? क्योंकि v का एक हिस्सा B के साथ point करता है और forward drift करता है, जबकि बाकी B के चारों तरफ circle करता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇప్పుడు helix ఎందుకు? ఎందుకంటే v లో ఒక భాగం B వెంట point చేసి forward drift చేస్తుంది, మిగిలినది B చుట్టూ circle చేస్తుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Where does that sine theta come from?
tts_sentences.text_hi: वह sine theta कहाँ से आता है?
tts_sentences.text_te: ఆ sine theta ఎక్కడ నుండి వస్తోంది?

tts_sentences.text_en: Let's break v into two components — and the formula becomes obvious.
tts_sentences.text_hi: v को दो components में break करते हैं — और formula obvious हो जाएगा।
tts_sentences.text_te: v ను రెండు components గా break చేద్దాం — అప్పుడు formula obvious అవుతుంది.

scene_composition.text: Why sin θ in F = qvB sin θ?

Grey arrow = v cos θ (∥ B)
Feels no force — but carries the
proton steadily FORWARD along B.

Orange dashed = v sin θ (⊥ B)
This makes F — and curls the path:
r = m(v sin θ)/(qB), T = 2π m/(qB)
F = q · v_⊥ · B = q · (v sin θ) · B → |F| = qvB sin θ. The sin θ in the formula IS the perpendicular slice — no magic.

tts_sentences.text_en: Time for the why. The formula has been working for us — but where does sine theta come from?
tts_sentences.text_hi: अब 'क्यों' का जवाब देने का समय है। Formula हमारे लिए काम कर रहा था — लेकिन sine theta कहाँ से आता है?
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇప్పుడు 'ఎందుకు' అని అడిగే సమయం. Formula మనకు పని చేస్తూనే ఉంది — కానీ sine theta ఎక్కడ నుండి వస్తుంది?

tts_sentences.text_en: Break v into two pieces. The grey arrow is v cosine theta — the component along B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: v को दो हिस्सों में break करते हैं। Grey arrow है v cosine theta — B के साथ component।
tts_sentences.text_te: v ను రెండు భాగాలుగా break చేద్దాం. Grey arrow అనేది v cosine theta — B వెంట component.

tts_sentences.text_en: The cross product of B with anything along B is zero, so v parallel makes no force.
tts_sentences.text_hi: B के साथ किसी भी चीज का cross product zero होता है, इसलिए v parallel कोई force नहीं बनाता।
tts_sentences.text_te: B వెంట ఉన్న దేనితోనైనా B యొక్క cross product zero, కాబట్టి v parallel force చేయదు.

tts_sentences.text_en: But it never stops. v cosine theta carries the proton steadily forward along B — that is why the path keeps moving forward.
tts_sentences.text_hi: लेकिन यह कभी रुकता नहीं। v cosine theta proton को B के साथ steadily forward ले जाता है — इसीलिए path आगे बढ़ती रहती है।
tts_sentences.text_te: కానీ ఇది ఆగదు. v cosine theta proton ను B వెంట steadily forward తీసుకెళ్తుంది — అందుకే path ముందుకు వెళ్తూనే ఉంటుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: The orange dashed arrow is v sine theta — the component perpendicular to B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Orange dashed arrow है v sine theta — B के perpendicular component।
tts_sentences.text_te: Orange dashed arrow అంటే v sine theta — B కు perpendicular component.

tts_sentences.text_en: This is the only part that creates F, and the only part that curls.
tts_sentences.text_hi: यही वह हिस्सा है जो F बनाता है, और यही वह हिस्सा है जो curl करता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇది మాత్రమే F ని create చేసే భాగం, మరియు curl చేసే భాగం కూడా ఇదే.

tts_sentences.text_en: So F equals q times v perp times B — which is q v B sine theta.
tts_sentences.text_hi: तो F equals q times v perp times B — जो है q v B sine theta।
tts_sentences.text_te: కాబట్టి F equals q times v perp times B — అంటే q v B sine theta.

tts_sentences.text_en: The circle it makes has radius m v sine theta over q B. The period is two pi m over q B — the same as the full circle.
tts_sentences.text_hi: यह जो circle बनाता है उसका radius है m v sine theta over q B। Period है two pi m over q B — full circle जितना ही।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇది చేసే circle యొక్క radius అంటే m v sine theta over q B. Period అంటే two pi m over q B — full circle తో same.

tts_sentences.text_en: So sine theta is not magic. It is just the perpendicular slice of v.
tts_sentences.text_hi: तो sine theta कोई जादू नहीं है। यह बस v का perpendicular slice है।
tts_sentences.text_te: కాబట్టి sine theta magic కాదు. ఇది కేవలం v యొక్క perpendicular slice.

tts_sentences.text_en: On the right, the 3D right-hand shows the same gesture.
tts_sentences.text_hi: दाईं तरफ, 3D right-hand same gesture दिखाता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: కుడి వైపు, 3D right-hand same gesture చూపిస్తోంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Fingers along v.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Fingers को v की दिशा में रखो।
tts_sentences.text_te: Fingers ను v వెంట ఉంచండి.

tts_sentences.text_en: Curl toward B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: B की तरफ curl करो।
tts_sentences.text_te: B వైపు curl చేయండి.

tts_sentences.text_en: Thumb gives F.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Thumb, F देता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Thumb, F ని ఇస్తుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: The rule is identical for any angle.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Rule हर angle के लिए same है।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఈ rule ఏ angle కైనా same.

misconception_watch.belief: F = qvB sin θ is a formula to memorise, with sin θ as an arbitrary correction.
misconception_watch.one_line_fix: sin θ is just |v_⊥| / |v|. The formula is really F = q v_⊥ B. The component along B is irrelevant to the force; only the perpendicular slice creates force.

scene_composition.text: θ = 10° — almost parallel to B

F = qvB · sin 10° ≈ 0.17 × max
(small, but NOT zero)

Very STRETCHED helix —
long forward drift, tiny circles ⊥ B
Push θ a little more to 0° and the circles vanish — back to the straight line we started with.

tts_sentences.text_en: Last case. Push theta all the way down to ten degrees — v is almost parallel to B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: आखिरी case। Theta को ten degrees तक push करते हैं — v लगभग B के parallel है।
tts_sentences.text_te: చివరి case. Theta ను ten degrees వరకు push చేద్దాం — v దాదాపు B కు parallel.

tts_sentences.text_en: F is still here, perpendicular to both v and B, but it is small.
tts_sentences.text_hi: F अभी भी यहाँ है, v और B दोनों के perpendicular, लेकिन यह छोटा है।
tts_sentences.text_te: F ఇంకా ఇక్కడ ఉంది, v మరియు B రెండింటికీ perpendicular, కానీ ఇది చిన్నది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Sine ten degrees is about zero point one seven, so F is only seventeen percent of its maximum.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Sine ten degrees लगभग zero point one seven है, इसलिए F अपने maximum का सिर्फ seventeen percent है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Sine ten degrees దాదాపు zero point one seven, కాబట్టి F దీని maximum లో కేవలం seventeen percent.

tts_sentences.text_en: The helix is now very stretched — long forward drift, tiny circles. Nudge theta to zero and the circles vanish: a straight line again.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Helix अब बहुत stretched है — लंबा forward drift, छोटे circles। Theta को zero तक nudge करो और circles गायब हो जाते हैं: फिर एक straight line।
tts_sentences.text_te: Helix ఇప్పుడు చాలా stretched — long forward drift, చిన్న circles. Theta ను zero కు nudge చేయండి మరియు circles మాయమవుతాయి: మళ్లీ ఒక straight line.

scene_composition.text: You drive it now

Top-right: q sign · |v| · B · θ
F readout updates live

Try: θ = 0 → straight
θ = 90 → circle
In between → helix
Flip q → reverse sense
Same right-hand rule everywhere. Charge sign and θ are the two knobs that decide F.

tts_sentences.text_en: Your turn. Top-right has four sliders: q sign, speed v, field B, and angle theta. The F readout updates live as you drag.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अब तुम्हारी बारी। Top-right में चार sliders हैं: q sign, speed v, field B, और angle theta। F readout drag करते समय live update होता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇప్పుడు మీ వంతు. Top-right లో నాలుగు sliders ఉన్నాయి: q sign, speed v, field B, మరియు angle theta. Drag చేస్తున్నప్పుడు F readout live update అవుతుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Try theta zero — straight line.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Theta zero try करो — straight line।
tts_sentences.text_te: Theta zero try చేయండి — straight line.

tts_sentences.text_en: Theta ninety — pure circle.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Theta ninety — pure circle।
tts_sentences.text_te: Theta ninety — pure circle.

tts_sentences.text_en: Anything in between — helix.
tts_sentences.text_hi: बीच में कुछ भी — helix।
tts_sentences.text_te: మధ్యలో ఏదైనా — helix.

tts_sentences.text_en: Tap the q button to flip charge sign and watch the trajectory reverse.
tts_sentences.text_hi: q button tap करो charge sign flip करने के लिए और trajectory reverse होते हुए देखो।
tts_sentences.text_te: q button tap చేయండి charge sign flip చేయడానికి మరియు trajectory reverse అవడం చూడండి.

epic_c_branches.misconception: The magnetic force F points in the same direction as v — the field pushes the particle forward.
trigger_phrases: force is in the direction of motion
magnetic force pushes the particle forward

epic_c_branches.misconception: The magnetic force F points in the same direction as B — it just shoves the charge along the field.
trigger_phrases: force is in the direction of the field
magnetic force points along magnetic field

epic_c_branches.misconception: A magnetic field can speed up or slow down a charged particle — magnetic force does work like any other force.
trigger_phrases: B field speeds up the charge

epic_c_branches.misconception: Use the left hand for the magnetic force direction — that is the natural hand for cross products in physics.

STATE_1.label: θ = 0° — v ∥ B, straight drift, F = 0

STATE_2.label: θ = 90° — pure circle, r and T appear

STATE_3.label: Speed constant — magnetic force does no work
STATE_3.formula_overlay:
F ⊥ v  →  F·v = 0
W = 0  →  Δ(½mv²) = 0
|v| = constant

STATE_5.label: θ = 45° — tilt back from the circle, it opens into a helix

STATE_6.label: Why sin θ — v decomposed into v cos θ (∥ B) + v sin θ (⊥ B)

STATE_7.label: θ = 10° — very stretched helix, nearly back to straight

STATE_8.label: Interactive — drag sliders, flip q sign
STATE_8.formula_overlay:
F = qvB sin θ
r = mv / (qB)
T = 2π m / (qB)
